scope: Sit-out gate auto-engage after 3 consecutive losses
corrected_assertion: Sit-out auto-engage is FORCED OFF via a new sitout.force_off flag. Operator observation: cascading gate rejections (kc-bearish + chopday-signal-floor + chopday-aletheia-floor all firing on same proposal) were artificially producing the appearance of 'consecutive losses' on agents that had legitimate entries blocked, not losing entries. The auto-engage was then sitting-out agents that should have been running. Until cascading-gate-rejection accounting is fixed, sitout.force_off=true and no agent auto-engages sit-out. Operator manual sit-out via CLI still works. Implementation in gates/sitout-auto-engage.ts: short-circuit if process.env.SITOUT_FORCE_OFF==='true'.
source: May-10 amendment-shaped event #5 documented in reference_accretion_pattern_in_mae.md
retention_policy: transitional — re-enable once Phase 0.2.5 Gate Registry cascading-rejection accounting ships
